37.reason: This else only attaches to the last if, not to all three. When the first or second if is true, the else still executes, printing an extra '-'.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This else only attaches to the last if, not to all three. When the first or second if is true, the else still executes, printing an extra '-'.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  // This else is attached only to the previous if (digit check). When a valid expansion occurs in the first or second if block, this else still executes because the digit condition is false, causing an extra '-' to be printed. It should be part of a proper if-else if chain to avoid printing the dash when any expansion is performed.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This else is only attached to the last if (digit check), causing a '-' to be printed after every successful expansion. The three type checks should be combined with else if, and the else should only print '-' when none of the types match.]

21.reason: Should be 'else if' to form a proper conditional chain. Otherwise, after successfully matching and expanding a lowercase range, the code falls through to the final 'else' block and incorrectly prints an extra '-'.
